---
title: "AI Disclosure"
subtitle: "AI Assistance Disclosure"
author:
  - name: Afreen Alam
number-sections: true
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: cerulean
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
date-modified: today
date-format: long
execute:
  echo: false
  eval: false
---

## Prompt 1

```text

```
## AI Prompt
```text

```

```text

```
## AI Prompt
```text

```

```text


```
## AI Prompt
```text

```
```text

```

```text

```
